gates.requirement: Exact branch, HEAD, origin/main, and origin/v1.4.0-development baseline equality is enforced.
Stable v1.3.0 tag target is unchanged.
WP0/WP1/WP2/WP3 canonical records and historical SHA-256 ledgers are byte-preserved.
Theorem IDs, canonical names, symbols, signatures, dependencies, and locked hashes for T157-T162 are unchanged.
Lean 4 source contains T157-T162 with no proof holes.
Coq source contains T157-T162 with no proof holes.
T157 is completed in both backends.
T158 is completed in both backends while retaining explicit conditional premises.
T159 is completed in both backends.
T160 is completed in both backends while retaining explicit conditional premises.
T161 is completed in both backends without converse or completeness promotion.
T162 is completed in both backends without archive-to-current promotion.
Inherited dependencies T123/T124/T126/T131-T142 are imported, not redefined or renumbered.
All six normalized statement hashes reproduce the locked WP1 values.
Lean/Coq theorem correspondence is complete and 100 percent parity is recorded.
WP3 PASS remains non-certified when any required proof evidence is missing.
WP3 extension-theorem rejection remains deferred when proof evidence is missing.
WP3 candidate CERTIFIED activates only with exact dual-backend evidence and parity.
A backend or statement-parity failure maps to BACKEND_PARITY_FAILURE.
Positive and negative activation fixtures replay deterministically.
All WP4 JSON records validate under Draft 2020-12 schemas and the WP4 SHA-256 ledger reproduces.
Full Python regression, proof-hole scan, Lean build, Coq build, and git diff --check are required locally and in hosted CI.
Exact changed-path allowlist and rollback-on-any-FAIL are enforced.
No commit, push, tag, GitHub Release, Zenodo, DOI, WP5 start, force-push, or history rewrite is authorized.
